metadata.name: Germany Entity Details (Hardcopy Document)
metadata.description: Navigate Handelsregister, locate entity by registration ID, download AD (Aktuelle Drucke) PDF

actions.javascript: () => { const btn = document.querySelector('button.ui-cookie-consent-btn, .cc-btn.cc-dismiss, button[aria-label="Okay"], a.cc-btn'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return 'dismissed'; } return 'none'; }

actions.description: Truncate searchTerm to max 5 words (Handelsregister keyword limit)
actions.javascript: () => { const term = '${searchTerm}'; const words = term.split(/\s+/); return words.length > 5 ? words.slice(0, 5).join(' ') : term; }

actions.description: Enter company name into keyword search (max 5 words)
Find matching entity row by registrationId, extract entity info, and mark AD link for download
actions.javascript: () => { const regId = '${registrationId}'.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const tables = document.querySelectorAll('table.ui-panelgrid.ui-widget'); for (const table of tables) { const bold = table.querySelector('span.fontWeightBold'); if (!bold) continue; const text = bold.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); if (!text.includes(regId)) continue; const oddRow = table.querySelector('tr.ui-panelgrid-odd, tr.ui-widget-content:nth-child(2)'); if (!oddRow) continue; const nameCell = oddRow.querySelector('td.paddingBottom20Px'); const officeCell = oddRow.querySelector('td.sitzSuchErgebnisse'); const cells = oddRow.querySelectorAll('td'); const name = nameCell ? nameCell.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; const registeredOffice = officeCell ? officeCell.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; let status = ''; for (let i = 0; i < cells.length; i++) { if (cells[i].classList.contains('sitzSuchErgebnisse') && i + 1 < cells.length) { status = cells[i + 1].textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); break; } } const adLinks = table.querySelectorAll('a'); let adFound = false; for (const a of adLinks) { if (a.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() === 'AD') { a.setAttribute('data-bizscraper-ad-target', 'true'); adFound = true; break; } } return JSON.stringify({ name, identifier: text, status, registeredOffice, adFound }); } return null; }

actions.description: Fail if no matching entity found
actions.javascript: () => { throw new Error('No matching entity found for the given registration ID'); }

actions.description: Download AD (Aktuelle Drucke) PDF from the matched entity row (skipped if no AD link)
